title: Sweet Spot Intervals
description: Maximize threshold adaptation with manageable fatigue
purpose: Maximize threshold adaptation with manageable fatigue

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 93% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 15:00 at 93%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/3. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 15:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/3. Power: 88-93%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/3. 40% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 2/3. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 1 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 40% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 15:00 at 93%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45 minutes of work done. 25 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 25 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 93% for 15:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 93% × 15:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15:00 at 93%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 93% for 15:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 93% × 15:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 65 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 86% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
